stageTable.gingerBeer: qty 24, unit null (ab52796d upload path); pass-c-raw variant unit=un

answers.q1_paccheri_trace: invoice_items: 24/null. Structured purchase: weight_or_volume, purchaseContainerCount=24, package 500g. purchaseQuantity=24 (row qty), purchaseUnit=g (structured usable). ingredients.purchase_unit=un (catalog/procurement, not used for Last Purchase label).
answers.q2_ginger_trace: invoice_items: 24/null. Structured purchase: weight_or_volume, purchaseContainerCount=24, package 20cl. purchaseQuantity=24, purchaseUnit=cl→ml in ingredient fields. ingredients.purchase_unit=ml. Same display path as Paccheri.
answers.q3_invoiceReview_fieldPath: resolveInvoiceLinePricingPresentation → card.purchaseQuantityLine = join(formatRowPurchaseQuantityLabel(invoice_items.quantity + invoice_items.unit), formatPurchasedPackDetail(structured, name, invoice_items.unit)). Does NOT read ingredients.purchase_unit or structured purchase format for the row-quantity noun.
answers.q4_ingredientDetail_fieldPath: loadIngredientMatchedInvoiceProducts → invoice_items.unit → invoiceMetadataFromProduct → buildRecentPurchases → formatRowPurchaseQuantityLabel(metadata). Last Purchase = purchaseQuantityLabel only. ingredients.purchase_unit and purchase history price rows are separate lines (Procurement Cost, etc.).
answers.q5_reread_unit_becomes_un: YES — resolveInvoicePersistedItemUnit now infers un via shouldInferUnForEmbeddedMeasureCountable when OCR unit is null, qty>1 integer, weight_or_volume, embedded g/cl in name, no pack markers. Corroborated by .tmp/embedded-measure-un-inference-validation/results.json (afterResolvedUnit=un for both rows).
answers.q6_ui_auto_shows_24_un: YES — formatRowPurchaseQuantityLabel with unit=un returns 24 un (line 783-784 invoice-purchase-price-semantics.ts). No UI code change required.
answers.q7_pellegrino_vs_paccheri_formatter: Pellegrino has persisted unit=un AND multi_unit_pack → row label 2 un + formatPurchasedPackDetail 15 × 75 cl. Paccheri has unit=null → bare formatPurchaseCount(24); weight_or_volume never produces purchasedPackDetail (resolveUnitsPerPack requires multi_unit_pack).

paccheri.packDetailSuffix: none (weight_or_volume — no · 500 g suffix in Invoice Review)
